specific_question: By how much has Elexion Automotive reduced its lithium-ion battery procurement costs between Q1 and Q3, 2025?
answer: According to procurement data, Elexion Automotive reduced its EV battery procurement costs by 7% between January 1 and September 30, 2025, through long-term supplier contracts and improved EV battery material forecasting.
dr_question: Given the evolving battery price trends, supply chain dynamics, and regional material availability highlighted in the 2024 IEA report "Trends in Electric Cars", how can Elexion Automotive optimize its battery sourcing and procurement strategy to maintain cost efficiency and production resilience by Q1 2026?
